scripts.test: pnpm run test:fix-exported && pnpm run test:remove-comments && pnpm run test:file-jsdoc && pnpm run test:transform-eslintrc && pnpm run test:transform-packagejson && pnpm run test:migrate-package-json-tooling && pnpm run test:transform-flat-config-strings
scripts.test:transform-eslintrc: codemod jssg test -l javascript ./scripts/transform-eslintrc-config.ts --filter transform-eslintrc && codemod jssg test -l json ./scripts/transform-eslintrc-config.ts --filter transform-eslintrc && codemod jssg test -l yaml ./scripts/transform-eslintrc-config.ts --filter transform-eslintrc
